page_metadata.biotools__summary: Proteogenomic pipeline integrating ribosome profiling (RIBO-seq) data in the search for new proteoforms in proteomic validation data. The pipeline does a genome-wide construction of candidate translation products based on ribosome occupancy.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Proteogenomic pipeline integrating ribosome profiling (RIBO-seq) data in the search for new proteoforms in proteomic validation data. The pipeline does a genome-wide construction of candidate translation products based on ribosome occupancy.
